title: [Codex Improvement] Stabilize repeated CI failure cluster
body:
<!-- codex-improvement:ci-failure-repeat-cluster -->
Run: 2026-03-04-PM

## Delivery Contract
- Owner: codex
- Due: 2026-03-07 UTC (3 day target)
- Priority: medium

## Trigger
3 CI failure signature(s) repeated in 24h.

## Why This Matters
Recurring CI failures block merges and inflate cycle time.

## Suggested Action
Open one stabilization stream that addresses the top repeated CI signatures with durable regression guards.

## Evidence
- Deploy to Firebase Hosting on PR :: fix(codex): main-branch apply guard + preview channel quota pruning (repeats: 2)
- Deploy to Firebase Hosting on PR :: Codex Continuous Improvement 2026-03-04-autonomous-b3 (repeats: 2)
- Deploy to Firebase Hosting on PR :: feat(ga): add roadmap live-execution unblock pack (repeats: 2)

## Safety
- No direct push to main
- PR-only remediation
